nasb.text: Then the Ziphites came to Saul at Gibeah, saying, “Is not David hiding on the hill of Hachilah, which is before Jeshimon?”

esv.text: Then the Ziphites came to Saul at Gibeah, saying, “Is not David hiding himself on the hill of Hachilah, which is on the east of Jeshimon?”

cnv.text: 西弗人到基比亞來見掃羅，說：“大衛不是在曠野前面的哈基拉山中躲藏起來嗎？”

ccb.text: 西弗人到基比亚见扫罗，说：“大卫正躲在旷野附近的哈基拉山中。”
